Just discussing. There is a merge conflict probably because i changed code from laptop as well as this bot. Now what does that mean and what shall I do?

A merge conflict happens when two different sources (you on your laptop, and me via this bot) edit the **same lines of the same file** at the same time. Git can't automatically decide which version to keep, so it marks the conflict and asks you to resolve it manually.

## What happened

```
Your laptop branch:   A → B → C (your changes)
                              ↕ conflict here
Bot's branch:         A → B → D (my changes)
```

Both modified the same lines in `main.py`, so when git tried to m
I want to keep the bot changes. Can you help me with the commands and how I should run it?
Task completed: I want to keep the bot changes. Can you help me with the commands and how I should run it?
